tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_digester.test_continuous_mix module

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_digester.test_continuous_mix.conditions() → CurrentDayConditions

Current day conditions fixture for testing.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_digester.test_continuous_mix.digester() → ContinuousMix

Anaerobic Digester fixture for testing.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_digester.test_continuous_mix.manure_stream() → ManureStream

Manure Stream fixture for testing.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_digester.test_continuous_mix.time() → RufasTime

RufasTime fixture for testing.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_digester.test_continuous_mix.test_anaerobic_digester_init() → None

Test that an Anaerobic Digester is initialized correctly.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_digester.test_continuous_mix.test_receive_manure(digester: ContinuousMix, manure_stream: ManureStream) → None

Test that manure is received correctly.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_digester.test_continuous_mix.test_receive_manure_error(digester: ContinuousMix, manure_stream: ManureStream) → None

Test that Anaerobic Digester raises an error when incompatible manure is passed.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_digester.test_continuous_mix.test_process_manure(digester: ContinuousMix, manure_stream: ManureStream, conditions: CurrentDayConditions, time: RufasTime, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that manure is digested correctly.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_digester.test_continuous_mix.test_process_manure_empty_stream(digester: ContinuousMix, time: RufasTime, conditions: CurrentDayConditions, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that process_manure handles no manure to be processed correctly.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_digester.test_continuous_mix.test_calculate_generated_carbon_dioxide(digester: ContinuousMix) → None

Test that carbon dioxide mass and volume are calculated correctly.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_digester.test_continuous_mix.test_calculate_generated_methane(digester: ContinuousMix, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that carbon dioxide mass and volume are calculated correctly.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_digester.test_continuous_mix.test_destroy_volatile_solids(digester: ContinuousMix, time: RufasTime, mocker: MockerFixture, degradable: float, non_degradable: float, destroyed: float, expected_degradable: float, expected_non_degradable: float, expected_error_count: int) → None

Test that volatile solids are destroyed correctly.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_digester.test_continuous_mix.test_report_continuous_mix_outputs(digester: ContinuousMix, time: RufasTime, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Tests that output variables from an anaerobic digester are calculated correctly.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_digester.test_continuous_mix.test_calculate_CSTR_methane_volume(total_vol_sols: float, expected: float) → None

Test that the generated methane volume is calculated correctly.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_digester.test_continuous_mix.test_calculate_methane_leakage(mass: float, volume: float, leakage: float, expected_mass: float, expected_volume: float) → None

Test that methane leakage is calculated correctly.
